div.p: Subsystem: Coroutine Runtime / Scheduler Invariant: No coroutine shall be preempted while holding a spinlock/mutex. Implementation: Thread-Local Storage (TLS) Counter + Deferred Yield.

ol.li: Atomic Critical Sections: Logic between lock() and unlock() is atomic relative to the thread scheduler.
Wait Boundedness: Max deferral latency $\Delta T$ is equal to $max(CritSectionDuration)$.
Re-entrancy: The locks_held counter supports nested locks (recursive mutexes).
Strict Ordering: Decrement of locks_held MUST occur after raw_unlock to prevent race conditions.

g.text: impl<'a, T> Drop for LockGuard<'a, T> {
